title: Rainbow Balloons 50 pack 12 inch Multicoloured Latex Balloons Assorted Rainbow Balloons Birthday Balloons for Birthday Party Wedding Baby Shower
features: 【HYKJNBW Multicolored Balloons Pack】50PCS 12-inch Thicken latex Mixed Color Balloon, large quantity can meet your festival or party decorating needs, The weight of each balloons is 2.8g, 20% thicker than ordinary latex balloons, strong and long lasting, less likely to burst, It is an indispensable element for your party.
【Safe and High Quality】These rainbow balloons are made of premium latex material which is durable, durable and no stange smell, safe to be used for both kids and adults.

【Wide range of uses】suitable for Kids Party wedding birthday parties, Christmas New Year holiday decorations and business activities. Make your party full of charm and romance, make the event site more ceremonial, and bring more fun to the party.

【Support Helium & Air】The colourful balloons can be filled with helium or air, It is recommended to use pump inflation DO NOT overfill them to prevent popping. You can have these perfect decorations in just a few minutes!

【ATTENTION & WARNING】Please do not fill the Party Balloons with too much gas, and avoid burns, high temperature, sharp objects and excessive friction back and forth. Storm may cause an explosion. It is recommended for children over 8 years old.
description: Product Description HYKJNBW balloons Pack of 50 Thicken Latex Balloons for Kids Birthday Rainbow Party Decorations
